cards.Chinese: 海边的沙又软又白，我喜欢在上面走。
cards.English: The sand at the beach is both soft and white; I like walking on it.

cards.Chinese: 老板计划下个月带员工们去长沙旅游，他听说那里的风景很有特点。
cards.English: The boss plans to take the employees on a trip to Changsha next month; he heard the scenery there is very distinctive.

province

cards.English: If you omit these characters, the novel can easily become hard to understand.

如果省了这些字的话，那小说很容易看不懂。

cards.Chinese: 我的父亲在广东省工作，他是一名医生。
cards.English: My father works in Guangdong province; he is a doctor.

cards.English: It's been raining in Sichuan for days, so the clothes have been damp for several days even after hanging them up.

cards.Raw Text:
天气渐渐变冷了，你要多穿点衣服。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/渐

cards.English: People who sweat a lot tend to have better health.
cards.Raw Text:
汗多的人身体比较好。

cards.English: The clothes need washing; they're covered in sweat.

sweat

cards.English: The weather is very hot today; are you sweating?
cards.Raw Text:
今天的天气很热，你出汗了吗？
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/出 汗

cards.Raw Text:
公园里的老人没有谁比他下棋的水平更高。

哥哥在上海新买的大房子有两百平方米。

cards.Raw Text:

cards.Raw Text:
两个国家的总统为了和平常常见面交流。

cards.Raw Text:
父亲对待儿子和女儿是不平等的，大家都知道他更喜欢儿子。

对待 duìdài - to treat, approach, handle

虽然过着这样平淡的生活，这个家还是充满快乐。

cards.Chinese: 她的汉语很好，我们谁也赶不上她。
cards.English: Her Chinese is so good that none of us can catch up with her.
cards.Raw Text:
她的汉语很好，我们谁也赶不上她。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/赶

cards.Chinese: 火车马上就开了，我们赶得上赶不上？
cards.English: The train is about to leave; can we make it or not?
cards.Raw Text:
火车马上就开了，我们赶得上赶不上？
Characters: 赶

cards.Chinese: 我没时间吃饭了，要赶去上班。
cards.English: I don't have time to eat; I need to hurry to work.
cards.Raw Text:
我没时间吃饭了，要赶去上班。
Characters: 赶

cards.Chinese: 如果你家有只猫就可以把老鼠赶走。
cards.English: If you have a cat at home, it can drive away the mice.
cards.Raw Text:
如果你家有只猫就可以把老鼠赶走。
老鼠 láoshǔ - rat, mouse
Characters: 赶

cards.Chinese: 知道奶奶病了，大家都赶来医院看她。
cards.English: Hearing that grandma was sick, everyone rushed to the hospital to see her.
cards.Raw Text:
知道奶奶病了，大家都赶来医院看她。
to rush over
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/来 赶

cards.Chinese: 赶快把我的书还给我，不然我就告诉老师了。
cards.English: Quickly return my book to me, or I'll tell the teacher.
cards.Raw Text:
赶快把我的书还给我，不然我就告诉老师了。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/快 赶

cards.Chinese: 等大家都赶到那里的时候，已经是晚上七点了。
cards.English: By the time everyone had hurried there, it was already 7 PM.
cards.Raw Text:
等大家都赶到那里的时候，已经是晚上七点了。
rush or hurry to a place
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/到 赶

cards.Chinese: 平时我们五点下课，但今天五点十分才下课，超了十分钟。
cards.English: Normally we finish class at five, but today we got out at 5:10, ten minutes over.
cards.Raw Text:
平时我们五点下课，但今天五点十分才下课，超了十分钟。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/超

cards.Chinese: 这家公司超过一半的人都是大学生。
cards.English: More than half the people in this company are college graduates.
cards.Raw Text:
这家公司超过一半的人都是大学生。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/超

cards.Chinese: 只有不断超越自己你才能取得更大的进步！
cards.English: Only by constantly surpassing yourself can you achieve greater progress!
cards.Raw Text:
只有不断超越自己你才能取得更大的进步！
不断 búduàn - ceaselessly, unrelentingly
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/越

cards.Chinese: 我的哥们儿约我星期天一起去逛超市。
cards.English: My buddy invited me to go browse the supermarket with him on Sunday.
cards.Raw Text:
我的哥们儿约我星期天一起去逛超市。
supermarket
逛 guàng - stroll, shop
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/市 超

cards.Chinese: 虽然认识这么久了，但是我不知道你的兴趣爱好是什么。
cards.English: Although we've known each other so long, I don't know what your interests and hobbies are.
cards.Raw Text:
虽然认识这么久了，但是我不知道你的兴趣爱好是什么。
久 jiǔ - a long time
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/趣 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/兴

cards.Chinese: 这件事听起来很有趣！
cards.English: This matter sounds very interesting!
cards.Raw Text:
这件事听起来很有趣！
Characters: 趣 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/有

cards.Chinese: 你对做饭感兴趣吗？
cards.English: Are you interested in cooking?
cards.Raw Text:
你对做饭感兴趣吗？
be interested in
Characters: 趣 兴

cards.Chinese: 给我每天做的饭拍照是我的乐趣之一。
cards.English: Taking photos of the meals I make every day is one of my pleasures.
cards.Raw Text:
给我每天做的饭拍照是我的乐趣之一。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/乐 趣

cards.Chinese: 你有兴趣来我们公司上班吗？
cards.English: Are you interested in coming to work at our company?
cards.Raw Text:
你有兴趣来我们公司上班吗？
interested
Characters: 趣 兴

cards.Chinese: 我们不能忘记的一个事实是，人没有空气不能活下去。
cards.English: One fact we cannot forget is that humans cannot survive without air.
cards.Raw Text:
我们不能忘记的一个事实是，人没有空气不能活下去。
用法 1 - fact (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/事 实

cards.Chinese: 请把事实的经过告诉我。
cards.English: Please tell me the course of events.
cards.Raw Text:
请把事实的经过告诉我。
用法 1 - fact (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/事 实

cards.Chinese: 我买了三个包子，但事实上我只付了两个包子的钱。
cards.English: I bought three baozi, but in fact I only paid for two.
cards.Raw Text:
我买了三个包子，但事实上我只付了两个包子的钱。
用法 1 - in fact, in reality, actually, as a matter of fact, de facto, ipso facto
Characters: 事 实 上

cards.Chinese: 他胡乱说的，事实上他从来没有去过那。
cards.English: He was talking nonsense; in fact, he's never been there.
cards.Raw Text:
他胡乱说的，事实上他从来没有去过那。
用法 1 - in fact, in reality, actually, as a matter of fact, de facto, ipso facto
Characters: 事 实 上

cards.Chinese: 能读大学是一件好事。
cards.English: Being able to attend university is a good thing.
cards.Raw Text:
能读大学是一件好事。
用法 1 - good action, deed, thing or work. happy occasion
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 喝酒不是一件好事。
cards.English: Drinking alcohol is not a good thing.
cards.Raw Text:
喝酒不是一件好事。
用法 1 - good action, deed, thing or work. happy occasion
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 看来我来的时间不对，坏了你的好事！
cards.English: It seems I came at the wrong time and ruined your good thing!
cards.Raw Text:
看来我来的时间不对，坏了你的好事！
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 谢谢你做的这些好事，让我多花了三百块钱。
cards.English: Thanks for this 'good deed' of yours that made me spend an extra three hundred yuan.
cards.Raw Text:
谢谢你做的这些好事，让我多花了三百块钱。
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 他这个人特别好事，就怕事情不够乱。
cards.English: That person is especially meddlesome, afraid things aren't chaotic enough.
cards.Raw Text:
他这个人特别好事，就怕事情不够乱。
用法 3 - to be meddlesome
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 他是个好事的人，还是别和他玩了。
cards.English: He's a meddlesome person; better not hang out with him.
cards.Raw Text:
他是个好事的人，还是别和他玩了。
用法 3 - to be meddlesome
Characters: 事

cards.Chinese: 你有本事你来做啊！
cards.English: If you've got the skills, you do it!
cards.Raw Text:
你有本事你来做啊！
用法 1 - ability, skill
Characters: 事 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/本

cards.Chinese: 有本事的人一般不会说自己有本事。
cards.English: People with real ability generally don't go around saying they have ability.
cards.Raw Text:
有本事的人一般不会说自己有本事。
用法 1 - ability, skill
Characters: 事 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/本

cards.Chinese: 我们本来的见面时间是六点，现在路上车太多，我可能会晚几分钟。
cards.English: Our original meeting time was six o'clock; now there's too much traffic, I might be a few minutes late.
cards.Raw Text:
我们本来的见面时间是六点，现在路上车太多，我可能会晚几分钟。
用法 1 - adj. original
Characters: 来 本

cards.Chinese: 我们本来的计划是去北京，现在不去了。
cards.English: Our original plan was to go to Beijing; now we're not going.
cards.Raw Text:
我们本来的计划是去北京，现在不去了。
用法 1 - adj. original
Characters: 来 本

cards.Chinese: 我本来是要和你去看电影的，但是我生病了，所以去不了了。
cards.English: I originally planned to go see a movie with you, but I got sick, so I can't go.
cards.Raw Text:
我本来是要和你去看电影的，但是我生病了，所以去不了了。
用法 2 - adv. originally
Characters: 来 本

cards.Chinese: 我本来不来的，但是天气那么好，我就来了。
cards.English: I originally wasn't going to come, but the weather was so nice, so I came.
cards.Raw Text:
我本来不来的，但是天气那么好，我就来了。
用法 2 - adv. originally
Characters: 来 本

cards.Chinese: 我们什么时候聚一下？
cards.English: When shall we get together?
cards.Raw Text:
我们什么时候聚一下？
Characters: 聚

cards.Chinese: 我们几个好朋友每个星期都会办一次聚会。
cards.English: Our group of good friends holds a gathering every week.
cards.Raw Text:
我们几个好朋友每个星期都会办一次聚会。

Characters: 聚 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/会

cards.Chinese: 老同学聚会在一起，非常开心！
cards.English: Old classmates getting together is so much fun!
cards.Raw Text:
老同学聚会在一起，非常开心！
Characters: 聚 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/会

cards.Chinese: 你们聚在一起说什么呢？
cards.English: What are you all gathered together talking about?
cards.Raw Text:
你们聚在一起说什么呢？
to get together
Characters: 聚 起 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/在 Untitled

cards.Chinese: 你想喝什么呢？果汁还是牛奶？
cards.English: What would you like to drink? Juice or milk?
cards.Raw Text:
你想喝什么呢？果汁还是牛奶？

Characters: 果 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/汁

cards.Chinese: 服务员不小心把果汁泼到了客人身上。
cards.English: The waiter accidentally splashed juice onto the guest.
cards.Raw Text:
服务员不小心把果汁泼到了客人身上。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/%E6%B3%BC

cards.Chinese: 我的妹妹是一个活泼的小女孩。
cards.English: My little sister is a lively little girl.
cards.Raw Text:
我的妹妹是一个活泼的小女孩。

Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/活 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/泼

cards.Chinese: 我演我们老师，演得很好！
cards.English: I played the role of our teacher, and I did it very well!
cards.Raw Text:
我演我们老师，演得很好！
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/演

cards.Chinese: 昨天晚上的表演真的太好看了！我还想再看一次！
cards.English: Last night's performance was truly spectacular! I want to see it again!
cards.Raw Text:
昨天晚上的表演真的太好看了！我还想再看一次！
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/演 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/表

cards.Chinese: 你会不会表演呢？
cards.English: Can you perform or not?
cards.Raw Text:
你会不会表演呢？
Characters: 演 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/表

cards.Chinese: 那个歌手今晚在公园里有一场演出，你要去吗？
cards.English: That singer has a show in the park tonight; do you want to go?
cards.Raw Text:
那个歌手今晚在公园里有一场演出，你要去吗？
Characters: 出 演

cards.Chinese: 我们今天不是在公园里演出。
cards.English: We're not performing in the park today.
cards.Raw Text:
我们今天不是在公园里演出。
Characters: 出 演

cards.Chinese: 我昨天看到一群认真工作的演员，他们在拍电影。
cards.English: Yesterday I saw a group of hardworking actors; they were filming a movie.
cards.Raw Text:
我昨天看到一群认真工作的演员，他们在拍电影。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/员 演

cards.Chinese: 我希望以后能去那个歌手的演唱会，他唱歌真的太好听了！
cards.English: I hope I can go to that singer's concert in the future; his singing is truly wonderful!
cards.Raw Text:
我希望以后能去那个歌手的演唱会，他唱歌真的太好听了！

cards.Chinese: 你今天的演唱让很多人都感动了。
cards.English: Your singing today moved many people.
cards.Raw Text:
你今天的演唱让很多人都感动了。

Characters: 演 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/唱

cards.Raw Text:
请你今天给我们演唱一首《回家》！
用法 2 - to sing for an audience
Characters: 演 唱

这个事件给他带来了很大的伤害。

cards.Raw Text:
我不知道那天发生的事件。
用法 1 - event, happening, incident (MW: 个 gè)
Characters: 事 件

cards.Raw Text:
你快点儿告诉我拍广告的条件。

买房子需要很多条件，首先得有钱

Characters: 件 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/条

这个孩子家里的条件很好，每天有新衣服穿。
用法 2 - requirement, prerequisite, qualification
Characters: 件 条

他很讨厌，因此大家都不想帮他。

我不喜欢运动，因此我很胖。
用法 1 - therefore, so, for this reason, consequently
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/此 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/因

cards.Chinese: 妈妈要求我每天写日记。
cards.English: Mom requires me to write a diary every day.

日记里的故事都是真的。
用法 1 - diary
Characters: 记

cards.English: My mother is on a business trip every Friday.
